name: Patient Name
history: Death of a close aunt whom the patient considered a mother figure. The patient did not fulfill the aunt's last request and was not present at the time of death. Pattern of prioritizing others' needs over their own.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be abandoned
intermediate_belief: I must always be responsible and take care of others.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I don't meet others' expectations, I will be rejected.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of conflict and prioritizing others' needs over own.
situation: Reflecting on memories involving the aunt and the unfulfilled request.
auto_thought: I can't fail now; I have to hold out.
behavior: Attempts to reconnect with family and be present in their lives.
